creator: stefan@fh-mainz.de
text:
I completed the patch to
- Update to 0.45
- Take maintainership

Users of 0.43 should know that log_analysis *is* pre-alpha. Not
everything is backwards compatible:
- no more gui_mode_configuration_disabled or gui_mode_ignore_disabled
- using the "gui_mode_config_savelocal" option will not recognize local
  modifications made from earlier versions of log_analysis.

Best regards,
Stefan
